race.comment: WEMBANYAMA (7) was super first-up over an unsuitable trip, flying late to miss behind an in-form galloper by 0.6L. Straight up to 1400m is a big tick and he shouldn't be too far back from the draw. He ticks plenty of boxes here and with sharp improvement expected, he can get back to winning ways. HISTORY WON'T CARE (8) finished off strongly to win by 1.9L at this trip last start at Belmont in a strong performance. The wide draw is a query, though he does boast a good third-up record and has run well from the back previously. Any rain won't be an issue for him and he's a leading chance. YOUGIVEMECHILLS (11) flew home from the back last start to be 1.8L off the winner and he draws a better barrier this time around. Should sit much closer today as he hits his peak and a forward showing is on the cards. SIMPLY THINKIN' (4) finished strongly last start from last and will find this a little easier. Keep safe. DUG ANOTHER HOLE (6) is not out of this on recent form.
